'''Traveling and the Territories''' is one of the magic systems of the Willverse.

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Travelers]] are terrifying entities possessing a thousand powers, many of which are gruesome. These beings utilize Territories, which are powers summoned from elsewhere by a [[Traveler]]. A [[Territory]] can function as a place accessible through a Gate, and some Territories are capable of answering mental calls. For example, [[Valinhall]] is a house that serves as a [[Territory]] containing an entire world; it features slower time than the outside world and functions by testing and attacking those within its walls. While most [[Travelers]] summon power from external sources, [[Valinhall Travelers]] differ by summoning power into themselves, allowing them to excel in combat against other Territories. Specific types of [[Travelers]] exhibit unique abilities: [[Ornheim Travelers]] can summon stone from their [[Territory]] or use a carved [[ruby]] to create golems from tiles. Additionally, an [[Endross Traveler]] has the ability to control an [[Endross Gate]], which is a rift between worlds. These gates grow in power the longer they remain open and risk exploding or unleashing uncontrolled power if they escape a [[Traveler]]'s control.}}

== Territories ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault]]}} • {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's Territory]]}}

[[Category:Magic systems]]
